resetPasswordSuccessDescription: Your password has been successfully changed. You can now sign in with your new password.
checkEmail: Check your email for password reset instructions
connectToDashboard: Connect to your professional trading dashboard

errors.accountDeactivatedDescription: Your account has been deactivated. Please contact support if you think this is an error.
errors.accountNotFoundDescription: Please create an account from the Sign Up tab.
errors.profileCreationFailedDescription: Profile creation failed. Please contact support.
errors.authenticationErrorDescription: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.
errors.passwordMismatchDescription: Please ensure both password fields are identical.
errors.passwordTooShortDescription: Password must be at least 6 characters long.
errors.emailAlreadyRegisteredDescription: An account already uses this email. Sign in or use Forgot Password. If you previously requested permanent deletion, contact support.

success.accountCreatedDescription: Your account has been created. Confirm your email to start your free trial — no approval needed.
success.freeTrialActivatedDescription: Your account is ready with Free Trial access.
success.registrationSuccessfulDescription: Check your email to confirm your account and start your free trial.
success.freeTrialActivatedDescription: You now have access to 3 free queries. Enjoy exploring AlphaLens!

emailConfirmation.title: Check your email
emailConfirmation.sentTo: We sent a confirmation email to
emailConfirmation.clickLink: Please click the link in that email to activate your account.
emailConfirmation.checkSpam: Also check your spam folder if you can't find the email.
emailConfirmation.resentDescription: A new confirmation email has been sent.
emailConfirmation.pendingApproval: Once your email is confirmed, your free trial starts automatically — no approval required.
emailConfirmation.pendingDescription: We sent you a confirmation link. Please check your inbox (and spam folder) to activate your account.

reactivation.title: Request Account Reactivation
reactivation.description: Your account has been deactivated. Submit a request to our team.
reactivation.request_sent_description: Your reactivation request has been sent. You will receive a response via email within 24-48 hours.
reactivation.request_error_description: Unable to submit your request. Please try again or contact support.
reactivation.pending_request_description: You already have a pending reactivation request.
